properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was alone and drifting on the lonely sea of sin, Nothing but darkness, no sunshine within, I lifted up my eyes to the Lord in the sky, Glory to God He remembered me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus remembered me, oh glory, glory, And so He set me free, Once I was blind but now I can see Glory to God He remembered me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As He taught His disciples by the sea of Galilee He said He’d remember a mortal like me I asked for His forgiveness down on my knees Glory to God He remembered me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now the dawn is breaking I am happy and free No more sorrows and troubles for me I’m going home in glory My Saviour to see Glory to God He remembered me.
